description: Visualize catalytic tetrad comparison across Argonaute family members
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Summary of catalytic tetrad analysis
# HsAGO2 reference: D597-E637-D669-H807 (DEDH tetrad)
# This is the canonical catalytic tetrad for Argonaute slicer activity

data = {
    "HsAGO2\n(reference slicer)": {"D1": "D", "E/D": "E", "D2": "D", "H": "H", "slicer": True},
    "CSR-1\n(C.e. slicer)":       {"D1": "D", "E/D": "S", "D2": "D", "H": "D", "slicer": True},
    "ALG-1\n(C.e. miRNA)":        {"D1": "E", "E/D": "E", "D2": "P", "H": "N", "slicer": True},  # has slicer activity per Pal 2024
    "RDE-1\n(C.e. primary)":      {"D1": "E", "E/D": "H", "D2": "V", "H": "Q", "slicer": False},
    "WAGO-4\n(target)":           {"D1": "G", "E/D": "D", "D2": "T", "H": "N", "slicer": False},
}

# Create visualization
fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 1, figsize=(10, 6))

# Reference residues
ref_residues = {"D1": "D", "E/D": "E", "D2": "D", "H": "H"}
positions = ["D1", "E/D", "D2", "H"]
proteins = list(data.keys())

# Color coding: green if conserved (same as reference or conservative), red if substituted
cell_colors = []
cell_text = []

for prot in proteins:
    row_colors = []
    row_text = []
    for pos in positions:
        res = data[prot][pos]
        ref = ref_residues[pos]
        
        # Check if conserved (allowing D/E interchange at E position)
        if res == ref:
            color = '#2ecc71'  # green
        elif pos == "E/D" and res in "DE":
            color = '#f39c12'  # orange - conservative
        elif pos == "H" and res == "D":
            color = '#f39c12'  # orange - D can substitute for H in some AGOs
        elif pos == "D1" and res == "D":
            color = '#2ecc71'
        elif pos == "D2" and res == "D":
            color = '#2ecc71'
        else:
            color = '#e74c3c'  # red - non-conservative
        
        row_colors.append(color)
        row_text.append(res)
    cell_colors.append(row_colors)
    cell_text.append(row_text)

# Create table plot
table = ax.table(
    cellText=cell_text,
    rowLabels=proteins,
    colLabels=[f"{pos}\n(ref: {ref_residues[pos]})" for pos in positions],
    cellColours=cell_colors,
    loc='center',
    cellLoc='center'
)

table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(14)
table.scale(1.5, 2)

# Style the table
for (row, col), cell in table.get_celld().items():
    if row == 0:
        cell.set_text_props(weight='bold', fontsize=12)
        cell.set_facecolor('#34495e')
        cell.set_text_props(color='white', weight='bold', fontsize=12)
    if col == -1:
        cell.set_text_props(weight='bold', fontsize=11)
        cell.set_facecolor('#ecf0f1')

# Add slicer status column
slicer_status = ["Known\nslicer", "Known\nslicer", "Known\nslicer*", "Non-\nslicer", "Unknown\n(tested)"]
slicer_colors = ['#2ecc71', '#2ecc71', '#f39c12', '#e74c3c', '#e74c3c']

ax.set_xlim(-0.5, 6)
ax.set_ylim(-0.5, 7)
ax.axis('off')

ax.set_title("Catalytic Tetrad Conservation in Argonaute PIWI Domains\n"
             "Aligned to HsAGO2 D597-E637-D669-H807 (DEDH motif)\n", 
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

# Add legend
legend_text = ("Green = Conserved catalytic residue | "
               "Orange = Conservative substitution | "
               "Red = Non-conservative substitution\n"
               "*ALG-1: has slicer activity per Pal et al. 2024 (PMID:38477356) despite sequence divergence; alignment may be imperfect")
ax.text(0.5, -0.05, legend_text, transform=ax.transAxes, ha='center', va='top', fontsize=9, style='italic')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('catalytic_tetrad_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: catalytic_tetrad_comparison.png")

# Print summary
print("\n\n=== CATALYTIC TETRAD ANALYSIS SUMMARY ===")
print()
print("WAGO-4 PIWI domain (residues 594-924) aligned against HsAGO2:")
print("  Position D1 (HsAGO2 D597): G — NON-CONSERVATIVE substitution")
print("  Position E  (HsAGO2 E637): D — conservative (D/E), but likely irrelevant given other losses")
print("  Position D2 (HsAGO2 D669): T — NON-CONSERVATIVE substitution")  
print("  Position H  (HsAGO2 H807): N — NON-CONSERVATIVE substitution")
print()
print("CONCLUSION: WAGO-4 has lost 3 of 4 catalytic tetrad residues.")
print("This is consistent with Yigit et al. 2006 (PMID:17110334) which stated")
print("that downstream AGO proteins (WAGO family) 'lack key residues required")
print("for mRNA cleavage.'")
print()
print("WAGO-4 is predicted to be a NON-CATALYTIC Argonaute.")
print("The GO:0004521 (RNA endonuclease activity) annotation is likely INCORRECT.")
